targets.expr: abs(((sum(max by (source) (tx_created_total_24h{service_name="bank-sql-poller"})) - avg_over_time((sum(max by (source) (tx_created_total_24h{service_name="bank-sql-poller"})))[14d:1m])) / clamp_min(avg_over_time((sum(max by (source) (tx_created_total_24h{service_name="bank-sql-poller"}))[14d:1m]), 1)) * 100)
